text:
The Unnamed Worm Monster is a type of Greed Island creature. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 136 

Overview

It is a large purple worm-shaped creature with no eyes and a wide toothed mouth; it is able to run quickly in the underground tunnels also thanks to several pairs of tiny legs placed in the lower part of the body. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Gon and Killua encounter this monster while roaming Greed Island, but are unable to do anything, because Biscuit has yet to teach them how to defeat it. 

Card

Unknown
